name: Cream Pies (Vanilla Cream)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 vanilla bean, about 3 inches split lengthwise
1 Graham Cracker-Coated Pie Shell, baked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, whisk together the sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Add yolks, then immediately but gradually whisk in both milks. Drop in the vanilla bean.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently at first, then constantly as the mixture starts to thicken and begin to simmer, 8-10 minutes. Once it simmers, continue cooking, stirring constantly, for an additional minute.
4. Remove the pan from the heat; whisk in butter and brandy. Remove the vanilla bean, scrape out the seeds, and whisk them back into the filling.
5. Pour the filling into a shallow pan (another pie pan works well). Cover with plastic wrap to prevent skin from forming. Cool until warm, about 30 minutes.
6. Pour the warm filling into the pie shell and place another sheet of plastic wrap directly over the filling surface. Refrigerate the pie until completely chilled, at least 3 hours.
7. Whip cream to soft peaks. Add sugar and vanilla, continuing to whip until just stiff peaks form. Spread over the filling and refrigerate until ready to serve.
CHOCOLATE CREAM:
Follow the above recipe, adding 2 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa to the cornstarch mixture and stirring in 4 ounces of semisweet or bittersweet chocolate with butter. Substitute 1 teaspoon vanilla extract for the vanilla bean.
COCONUT CREAM:
Adjust the oven rack to the lower-middle position and preheat to 300°F. Scatter 1-1/4 cups sweetened flake coconut in a 9-inch square pan. Bake, stirring occasionally, until evenly golden brown, 20-25 minutes. Cool to room temperature. Follow the recipe above, stirring 1 cup of the coconut into the filling once the butter has melted. Continue with the recipe, sprinkling the remaining coconut over the whipped cream topping.
BANANA CREAM:
Follow the above recipe, spooning half the warm filling into the baked shell. Peel 2 medium bananas and slice them over the filling. Top with the remaining filling. Follow the recipe as directed.
